title: Diagnose EC2 OpenCode state
description: Inspect the persistent EC2 workstation's OpenCode process, tmux session, logs, configuration, and SQLite state; repair non-destructively and verify normal operation without exposing credentials or deleting sessions.
close_reason: OpenCode DB integrity is healthy. Fixed confusion by fetching all origin branches into the single-branch EC2 clone, verified all six recovery commits, and replaced old bd with MarkAtwood/beads tag v1.1.0-flatfile.2 commit 92962e2e while preserving rollback binary. Active OpenCode session exited cleanly and remains resumable.
